business_ideas.idea: Deal: platform for hiring remote contractors internationally with compliance automation
Adulting Vault: aggregated dashboard for all adult responsibilities and renewals
Snoo for adults: smart connected bed with temperature control and movement tracking
Subscription running shoe service: auto-delivery triggered by watch fitness data at 300-500 miles
Therapunch: padded rage room with boxing followed by guided meditation and spa relaxation
Startup SaaS Bundle: bundled software suite for seed/series A companies with modular add-ons
Educational games on Roblox for financial literacy and life skills with creator revenue sharing
Wellness membership bundling cryo, float tank, sauna and meditation classes

predictions.text: Companies built with data + algorithms can identify seed stage founders before VCs see them
Roblox-based educational games will scale faster than standalone learning apps due to existing user base
